claim_text: N supplied between stem elongation and heading accounts for 60% of total N uptake and can increase grain yield by 40%.

value.raw_value_text: the supply of N-fertilizer between stem elongation and the heading period amounts to 60% of the total N uptake and has a significant effect on increasing the number of spikelets and grains per ear, the grain protein content and grain weight, and causes an increase of 40% in grain yield
value.text_value: N supplied between stem elongation and heading accounts for 60% of total N uptake and can increase grain yield by 40%.

provenance.evidence_text: the supply of N-fertilizer between stem elongation and the heading period amounts to 60% of the total N uptake and has a significant effect on increasing the number of spikelets and grains per ear, the grain protein content and grain weight, and causes an increase of 40% in grain yield
